title: myosotis lingulata var. stolonifera
intro: Myosotis lingulata var. stolonifera, also known as creeping forget-me-not, is a perennial plant species within the genus Myosotis. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Myosotis lingulata var. stolonifera include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and its leaves and stems can be used fresh or dried for herbal preparations.
